about: As an actor, my focus is on portraying characters — a craft I studied in Los Angeles with Lee Strasberg and Stella Adler, and in New York City with Uta Hagen.
living: A dual citizen of Germany and the United States, I'm based in Berlin and work across film, television, commercials and games.
heroTagline: A character actor of rare range — from commanders and detectives to doctors, villains and quiet old men. Trained in the Method, working between Berlin and Los Angeles.
statementQuote: I don't play characters. I become them.
reelSubtitle: A selection of moving-image work — commercials, scenes and short films. Tap any title to play.
workSubtitle: Forty characters and counting — 2024–2026. Click any portrait to view it full-frame.
contactSubtitle: Available for film, television, commercials and motion capture. For bookings and inquiries, reach out directly or through my agency.
